name: Aegis
description: A sleek, white-and-gold explorer vessel designed for deep-space reconnaissance and diplomatic missions.

bays.name: Noble Quarters
bays.description: Lavish private suites reserved for high-ranking passengers. Each chamber features adaptive environment controls.

bays.name: Lobby
bays.description: The main chamber of the ship featuring the emperor's statue.

bays.name: Medical Bay
bays.description: State-of-the-art medical facility with regeneration chambers, rune-surgical suites.

bays.name: Psychometric Chamber
bays.description: A shielded sensory room designed for psyometric communication or memory rewiev. The walls are lined with void-field emitters to prevent interference.

bays.name: Guest Quarters
bays.description: Comfortable modular cabins for visiting diplomats, researchers, and allied personnel. Each pod includes personal gravity plating and climate control.

bays.name: Lounge
bays.description: An exclusive retreat for the passengers. Crystal decanters line the shelves, and the viewport spans the entire port wall.

bays.name: Xenoscience Lab
bays.description: A sealed research facility for analyzing alien artifacts, biological samples, and anomalous materials. Equipped with containment fields rated for Class-7 hazards.

bays.name: Xenoflora Laboratory
bays.description: A sealed biocontainment facility for cultivating and studying alien flora. Specimens are kept under controlled atmospheric conditions for research and medicinal extraction.

bays.name: Artificer Workshop
bays.description: A master craftsman's sanctum filled with arcane tools and enchanting stations. Here, weapons are forged, armor is reinforced, and magical artifacts are repaired or created.

bays.name: Sparring Room
bays.description: A reinforced training arena with adaptive gravity fields and holographic opponents. Used for combat drills and recreational martial arts tournaments.

bays.name: Storage Bay
bays.description: Climate-controlled cargo vaults for sensitive equipment, personal effects, and mission-critical supplies. Organized by an automated inventory drone swarm.

bays.name: Hydrotherapy Deck
bays.description: A zero-gravity aquatic chamber used for crew rehabilitation and relaxation. The floor features a panoramic observation window looking out into open space. The water is maintained at precisely 28°C with mineral-enriched recycled reserves.

abilities.name: Graviton Lattice
abilities.description: Detects gravitational pulses and shifts, then emits a counter-pulse to stabilize the vessel.

abilities.name: Phase Anchor
abilities.description: Locks the ship's position in both space and time.

abilities.name: Chrono-gravitic Array
abilities.description: Aligns both time and gravity to enable navigation through anomalies.

abilities.name: Graviton Lance
abilities.description: Focused graviton beam that distorts enemy hull integrity.

abilities.name: Pulsar Swarm
abilities.description: A volley of agile micro-missiles causing pinpoint energy bursts upon impact. Designed for rapid shield depletion.
